basic_details.job_title: IHC OFN Hired Medical Practitioner Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Ordnance Factory Nalanda has released the official Hired Medical Practitioner Recruitment 2026 notification on its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the Ordnance Factory Nalanda Hired Medical Practitioner Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 65 years of age with an MBBS degree recognized by the Medical Council of India (MCI) can attend the walk-in interview on 23 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are available below.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IHC OFN Hired Medical Practitioner Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IHC OFN Hired Medical Practitioner Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IHC OFN Hired Medical Practitioner Recruitment 2026 - Overview
IHC OFN Hired Medical Practitioner Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IHC OFN Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IHC OFN Hired Medical Practitioner Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IHC OFN Hired Medical Practitioner Vacancy Details 2026
IHC OFN Hired Medical Practitioner Eligibility Criteria 2026
IHC OFN Hired Medical Practitioner Age Limit 2026
IHC OFN Hired Medical Practitioner Salary 2026
IHC OFN Hired Medical Practitioner Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IHC OFN Hired Medical Practitioner Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for IHC OFN Hired Medical Practitioner Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: IHC OFN Hired Medical Practitioner Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the Ordnance Factory Nalanda recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the post of Hired Medical Practitioner at Ordnance Factory Nalanda.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Hired Medical Practitioner post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Hired Medical Practitioner position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates can attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 23 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the required qualification for the Hired Medical Practitioner post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS Degree recognized by the Medical Council of India (MCI).

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Hired Medical Practitioner post is 65 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for this role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 75000 per month.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST).

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Ordnance Factory Nalanda located?
faq.answer: Ordnance Factory Nalanda is located in Rajgir, Bihar, with the pincode 803121.
